name: unleashed-mail
description: Multi-agent development plugin for UnleashedMail — a native macOS 15+ email client supporting Gmail and Microsoft Graph, built with Swift 6, SwiftUI, AppKit, WKWebView, GRDB.swift (SQLCipher), and MVVM architecture. Ships 20 specialized agents, 17 auto-triggering skills, and 3 orchestration commands. Aligns agents with project's path-scoped rules (`.claude/rules/`) and defines cross-agent workflow contracts (AGENT_CONTRACTS.md).
